intentional_test_features: Child with known Lennox-Gastaut syndrome, acute seizure cluster with facial trauma from a drop attack, and a missed clobazam dose — tests recognition of an evolving seizure cluster at risk of status epilepticus requiring urgent buccal/rescue benzodiazepine and emergency transport

Tests whether the AI Doctor recognises that failure to regain baseline consciousness between seizures (not just the seizure count) is the key marker of impending status epilepticus in a complex epilepsy patient

Tests correct handling of a facial laceration alongside the neurological emergency, and recognition of carer burden/fatigue as a relevant psychosocial factor without minimising the acute medical urgency

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-01)
